title: Crispy Roasted Potato Fry
description: A delicious and easy-to-make side dish that combines crispy, roasted, and stir-fry cooking techniques with potatoes.

ingredients.name: Potatoes
ingredients.notes: choose high starch potatoes like Russet

instructions: Toss potatoes with 2 tbsp vegetable oil, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
Heat 1/2 cup vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add roasted potatoes to the skillet and stir-fry for 5 minutes.
Increase heat to high and fry until crispy and golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Drain on paper towels and serve hot.
